name: T-72B3
description: Modernized Soviet-era MBT. Most common Russian tank in active service. Kontakt-5 ERA provides protection against older ATGMs. Hot engine signature makes it highly visible to IR sensors. Limited organic anti-UAV capability.
how_to_detect: Strong IR signature from engine and exhaust
how_to_counter: Top-attack munitions target thin top armor
Engine deck targeting for maximum effect
